bird.name: Harwood's spurfowl
bird.summary: Harwood's spurfowl (Pternistis harwoodi), also known as Harwood's Francolin, is a species of bird in the family Phasianidae. It is a grey-b…

relations.subject: Harwood's spurfowl
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss as population pressures force locals into the marginal scrublands favored by the bird as its habitat
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
